## GOVERNMENT' OF NNDIA MINISTRY OF RURAL DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT OF RURAL DEVELOPMENT

## LOK SABHA UNSTARRED QUESTION NO: 646 TO BE ANSWERED ON 23.07.2015

## SKILL DEVELOPMENT UNDER MGNREGS

## 646. SHRIMATI KRISHNA RAJ:

Will the Minister of Rural Development be pleased to state:

- a whether the Government has formulated any scheme for linking skill development with MANREGA for providing employment to youth;
- if sO, the details thereof;
- whether the Government has fixed any targets for providing employment and financial assistance after imparting training under the Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushal Yojana in next three years; and
- (d) if s0, the details thereof?

## ANSWER MINISTER OF STATE IN THE MINISRY OF RURAL DEVELOPMENT (SHRI SUDARSHAN BHAGAT)

- (a) : Yes, Madam.
- The Government has launched a Project  for Livelihoods in Full Employment (LIFE) under MGNREGA. This project aims at improving the skill-base of the MGNREGA workers, thereby improving their livelihoods so that can move from their current partial employment to full employment status. The project, inter-alia, aims at convergence with Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Gremeen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY) for imparting placement linked skilling courses to members of MGNREGA households who have completed 100 work in 2014-15. they days`
- (c) (d): DDU-GKY has been  given a target of skilling 10.50 iakhs candidates in the 12th Five Year Plan period, including any skilling under LIFE. Against the target; & total of 5.29 lakhs candidate have been skilled (till 30th June 2015) under DDU-GKY.
